audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + đang + V]]. Put đang before an action to show that it is in progress now.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + đang + V]]: Đang is introduced as an imperfective/progressive marker preceding a dynamic predicate; it does not independently encode tense.

audienceSections.normal:
#### S + đang + V

Put đang before an action to show that it is in progress now. Example: [[grammar:Mai Chi đang ở thư viện.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### S + đang + V

Đang is introduced as an imperfective/progressive marker preceding a dynamic predicate; it does not independently encode tense. Literal example: [[grammar:Mai Chi đang ở thư viện.]]

audienceSections.normal: `đang` shows that something is happening now or is still in progress. Vietnamese can also show time through context, so do not add `đang` to every English sentence with “-ing.”
audienceSections.expert: Đang highlights an ongoing situation. Vietnamese time reference also depends on context; do not translate đang mechanically as a tense ending. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Mai Chi đang ở thư viện.]] — Mai Chi is at the library now.
- [[grammar:Mai Chi đang tìm sách tham khảo.]] — Mai Chi is looking for a reference book.
- [[grammar:Thủ thư đang ở kệ sách.]] — The librarian is by the bookshelf.
- [[grammar:Mai Chi có thẻ thư viện.]] — Mai Chi has a library card.
- [[grammar:Mai Chi đang mượn sách tham khảo.]] — Mai Chi is borrowing the reference book.
- [[grammar:Thu Hà đang đọc báo.]] — Thu Hà is reading a newspaper.
- [[grammar:Mai Chi trả sách.]] — Mai Chi returns a book.
- [[grammar:Thủ thư kiểm tra thẻ thư viện.]] — The librarian checks the library card.
- [[grammar:Kệ sách rất yên tĩnh.]] — The bookshelf area is very quiet.
- [[grammar:Thu Hà đang tìm tạp chí.]] — Thu Hà is looking for a magazine.
breakdown.expert:
- [[grammar:Mai Chi đang ở thư viện.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 1 > sentence 1.
- [[grammar:Mai Chi đang tìm sách tham khảo.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 1 > sentence 2.
- [[grammar:Thủ thư đang ở kệ sách.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 1 > sentence 3.
- [[grammar:Mai Chi có thẻ thư viện.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 1 > sentence 4.
- [[grammar:Mai Chi đang mượn sách tham khảo.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 1.
- [[grammar:Thu Hà đang đọc báo.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 2.
- [[grammar:Mai Chi trả sách.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 3.
- [[grammar:Thủ thư kiểm tra thẻ thư viện.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 4.
- [[grammar:Kệ sách rất yên tĩnh.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 5.
- [[grammar:Thu Hà đang tìm tạp chí.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 6.

characters.heading: Sino-Vietnamese Vocabulary
characters.normal:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| sách tham khảo | 冊參考 | reference book | `Mai Chi đang tìm sách tham khảo.` |
| thủ thư | 守書 | librarian | `Thủ thư đang ở kệ sách.` |

The characters show established Hán-Việt word parts for vocabulary first introduced in this chapter. Keep using the modern Vietnamese spellings from the reading.
characters.expert:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| sách tham khảo | 冊參考 | reference book | `Mai Chi đang tìm sách tham khảo.` |
| thủ thư | 守書 | librarian | `Thủ thư đang ở kệ sách.` |

Expert context: the mappings record Vietnamese lexical history and constituent order, not a claim that modern Vietnamese writes these words in characters or that every sequence is a current Chinese lexical form.
